productName: Shatter J's Infused Pre-roll Blackberry Pie - 5g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Blackberry Pie and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of blueberry, berry, and grape, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
